ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND ( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Phone_Type__c, "Home"), ISBLANK(HomePhone)), AND ( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Phone_Type__c, "Mobile"), ISBLANK(MobilePhone)), AND ( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Phone_Type__c, "Work"), ISBLANK(Work_Phone__c)), AND ( ISPICKVAL(Preferred_Phone_Type__c, "Phone (Other)"), ISBLANK(Phone_Other__c)) )
